name: Reverberating Stone
description:
Activate f envision

Trigger You use the affixed shield to Shield Block a melee attack

Requirements You're a master in Athletics, and you have the affixed shield raised.

This heavy metal emblem is mounted on the face of the affixed shield and has a dull gray gemstone embedded at its center. When you Activate the talisman, the gem shatters, releasing a powerful shockwave in a that must include the enemy who struck the triggering blow, if possible. Each creature in the cone takes |options:area-damage] with a . Any creature that fails its save is pushed 5 feet away from you (or 10 feet on a critical failure).
